name: ExtensionAuditEvent_Entity_Detail_Value
title: R5: value additional types
description: R5: `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` additional types (Quantity, CodeableConcept, boolean, integer, Range, Ratio, time, dateTime, Period)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` 1..1 `base64Binary, boolean, CodeableConcept, dateTime, integer, Period, Quantity, Range, Ratio, string, time`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` 1..1 `base64Binary, boolean, CodeableConcept, dateTime, integer, Period, Quantity, Range, Ratio, string, time`
*  R4B: `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` 1..1 `base64Binary, string`
*  R4: `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` 1..1 `base64Binary, string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` do not cover the following types: boolean, CodeableConcept, dateTime, integer, Period, Quantity, Range, Ratio, time.
The target context `AuditEvent.entity.detail.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `AuditEvent.entity.detail`.
